specs.title: cp-000: Successful PPTX preview shows title slide count optional theme name and original
cp-001: Slide preview cards show slide index layout label and image count only when imag
cp-002: Slide preview text is clamped to three lines in the import preview
cp-003: Import preview shows only the first six extracted slide previews even when more
cp-004: Import warnings are capped to the first three visible rows plus a N more warning
cp-005: Ready-state primary import button label is Import into ScholarSync
cp-006: Importing-state primary import button label changes to Importing
cp-007: Secondary import action label is Choose another file
cp-008: Successful import redirects directly to slidesdeckId
cp-009: Failed import after preview returns to ready phase and preserves the preview car
cp-010: Empty state on slides is a dashed border panel rather than a plain centered mess
cp-011: Empty-state helper copy explicitly mentions creating a new deck or importing an
cp-012: Non-empty deck cards use a generic Presentation icon placeholder not a real slid
cp-013: Slides list cards show only title slide count theme name and updated date
cp-014: Slides list card delete button is hover-revealed and positioned in the top-right
cp-015: Slides list delete failures are ignored silently after confirmation
cp-016: slidesnew uses step names topic audience theme and generating rather than a gene
cp-017: slidesnew starts with step topic audienceType general and themeKey modern
cp-018: Topic-step title is Whats your presentation about
cp-019: Topic-step helper copy says Give it a title and optionally describe the content
cp-020: Topic-step title input is autofocus-enabled
cp-021: Topic-step description textarea uses four rows
cp-022: Topic-step Next is disabled only when trimmed title is empty
cp-023: Audience-step title is Whos your audience
cp-024: Audience-step helper copy says it helps tailor language depth and style
cp-025: Audience-step renders exactly seven audience options in a 2-column grid
cp-026: Audience option labels are General Conference Thesis Defense Journal Club Classr
cp-027: Theme-step title is Pick a theme
cp-028: Theme-step helper copy says the theme can be changed anytime in the editor
cp-029: Theme-step theme list is limited to the first eight keys from PRESET_THEMES
cp-030: Theme-step preview tiles show only abstract bars and the capitalized theme key l
cp-031: Theme-step primary CTA label is Create Presentation
cp-032: Clicking Create Presentation immediately switches the route to the generating st
